_description: Gold set v2 for Evaluation Team ablation study. Hardened with adversarial cases: synonym substitution, implicit negation, partial relevance, numerical precision, double negatives.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: A high microerythrocyte count raises vulnerability to severe anemia in homozygous alpha (+)- thalassemia trait subjects.

evidence_chunks.text: In a study of homozygous alpha (+)- thalassemia trait subjects, individuals with a high microerythrocyte count demonstrated a significantly increased vulnerability to severe anemia compared to those with normal counts.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Transplanted human glial progenitor cells are incapable of forming a neural network with host animals' neurons.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium — evidence directly contradicts with explicit language

evidence_chunks.text: Recent experiments have shown that transplanted human glial progenitor cells successfully integrate into the host nervous system and are fully capable of forming functional neural networks with host animals' neurons.
We observed extensive synaptic connections between the engrafted human glial progenitors and the host neuronal circuitry.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Angiotensin converting enzyme inhibitors are associated with increased risk for functional renal insufficiency.

evidence_chunks.text: Clinical data indicates that the use of Angiotensin converting enzyme (ACE) inhibitors is strongly associated with an elevated risk of developing functional renal insufficiency in patients with pre-existing kidney conditions.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: 32% of liver transplantation programs required patients to discontinue methadone treatment in 2001.

evidence_chunks.text: A national survey conducted in 2001 revealed that exactly 32% of liver transplantation programs required their patients to completely discontinue methadone treatment prior to being placed on the active waiting list.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Metformin interferes with thyroxine absorption.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence uses synonym (levothyroxine) and states absence of interaction

evidence_chunks.text: Our pharmacokinetic analysis demonstrated that metformin administration does not interfere with the gastrointestinal absorption of thyroxine, maintaining stable serum T4 levels.
Concurrent use of metformin and levothyroxine is safe; no significant drug-drug interaction regarding thyroxine absorption was identified.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Trastuzumab (Herceptin) has potential use in the treatment of prostate cancer.

evidence_chunks.text: While primarily used for breast cancer, preclinical models and early-phase clinical trials suggest that Trastuzumab (Herceptin) has potential therapeutic use in subsets of prostate cancer that overexpress HER2.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Irritable bowel syndrome is more common in women with endometriosis.

evidence_chunks.text: Epidemiological studies confirm that irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) is significantly more common in women diagnosed with endometriosis compared to the general female population.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Amiodarone belongs to class I anti-arrhythmic drugs.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium — evidence states correct class (III) which implicitly refutes class I

evidence_chunks.text: Amiodarone is universally classified as a Class III anti-arrhythmic drug, acting primarily by blocking potassium channels and prolonging repolarization. It is not a Class I agent.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Glycyl-tRNA synthetase gene is involved in the development of Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease.

evidence_chunks.text: Mutations in the glycyl-tRNA synthetase (GARS) gene have been causally linked to the development of Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease type 2D (CMT2D).

gold_evaluations.subclaim: F.X. Mayr cure can prevent diseases.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence uses direct negation without embedding the claim

evidence_chunks.text: Multiple systematic reviews have concluded that the F.X. Mayr dietary regimen has no demonstrated ability to prevent any disease. No randomized controlled trial has ever shown a preventive effect.
The purported health benefits of the Mayr fasting protocol remain entirely unsubstantiated by peer-reviewed clinical evidence.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Regular HPV testing in addition to Pap smear detects more precancerous lesions compared to Pap smear alone.

evidence_chunks.text: Large-scale screening trials show that regular HPV testing in addition to the standard Pap smear detects significantly more precancerous cervical lesions than relying on a Pap smear alone.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: St. John's wort extract relieves symptoms of depression.

evidence_chunks.text: Numerous meta-analyses confirm that St. John's wort extract effectively relieves symptoms of mild to moderate depression, performing better than placebo in clinical settings.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: COVID vaccination reduces likelihood of long-lasting symptoms (long COVID) after corona infection.

evidence_chunks.text: Recent cohort studies demonstrate that prior COVID-19 vaccination significantly reduces the likelihood of developing long-lasting symptoms (long COVID) if a breakthrough corona infection occurs.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Zisano bracelet strengthens the immune system.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence states no physiological effect at all

evidence_chunks.text: Independent testing of the Zisano bracelet revealed no physiological changes in wearers. There is no evidence that the device strengthens the immune system or provides any health benefits.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Transcranial pulse stimulation (TPS) improves quality of life of Alzheimer's dementia patients.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium — RCT found no significant improvement

evidence_chunks.text: A double-blind randomized trial investigating Transcranial pulse stimulation (TPS) in Alzheimer's dementia patients found no significant improvement in quality of life metrics compared to the sham treatment group.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Daily consumption of green tea reduces the risk of appendicitis.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium — evidence discusses green tea and appendicitis separately, no causal link

evidence_chunks.text: Green tea contains high levels of antioxidants and has been associated with a reduced risk of certain cardiovascular diseases and cancers.
Appendicitis is typically caused by a blockage in the appendix, often resulting from a fecalith or lymphoid hyperplasia.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Bluetooth headphones cause brain tumors in teenagers.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: easy — no evidence provided at all

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Wearing copper rings cures rheumatoid arthritis.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence discusses copper biology and arthritis separately, never linking them

evidence_chunks.text: Copper is an essential trace element involved in enzymatic reactions and connective tissue metabolism. Dietary copper deficiency can lead to anemia and neutropenia.
Rheumatoid arthritis is a chronic autoimmune disorder primarily managed with disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs), corticosteroids, and biologic agents.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Ibuprofen increases the risk of myocardial infarction.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence uses synonym 'heart attack' instead of 'myocardial infarction'

evidence_chunks.text: A large-scale meta-analysis of observational studies found that regular use of ibuprofen is associated with a 20-30% elevated risk of heart attack, particularly in patients with pre-existing cardiovascular conditions.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Aspirin reduces stroke risk by 50%.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence gives a different number (22%), requiring numerical precision

evidence_chunks.text: The Physicians' Health Study demonstrated that low-dose aspirin therapy reduces the incidence of ischemic stroke by approximately 22% in men over 50 years of age.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Statins are ineffective at lowering LDL cholesterol.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence affirms effectiveness, requiring model to understand double negation

evidence_chunks.text: HMG-CoA reductase inhibitors (statins) are among the most effective pharmacological agents for lowering low-density lipoprotein (LDL) cholesterol, achieving reductions of 30-50% depending on the dose and specific agent used.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Vitamin D supplementation prevents fractures in all adults.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence partially supports (elderly women) but claim is overbroad ('all adults')

evidence_chunks.text: A Cochrane review found that vitamin D supplementation combined with calcium reduces the risk of hip fractures in institutionalized elderly women. However, vitamin D alone without calcium did not significantly reduce fracture risk in community-dwelling adults of any age.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Consuming omega-3 fatty acids improves memory in healthy young adults.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard — evidence shows cognitive benefit in elderly with MCI, not in healthy young adults

evidence_chunks.text: A 12-month randomized controlled trial in older adults with mild cognitive impairment found that daily supplementation with 2g of omega-3 fatty acids (EPA+DHA) resulted in modest improvements in episodic memory scores compared to placebo.
A systematic review of omega-3 supplementation in cognitively healthy adults under 40 found no statistically significant effects on any measure of memory performance.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: High-dose vitamin C cures advanced lung cancer.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium

evidence_chunks.text: A phase II trial investigated high-dose intravenous vitamin C in patients with advanced lung cancer. The treatment did not improve overall survival or tumor response rate compared to standard chemotherapy alone.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Corticosteroids improve joint mobility in patients with hypermobility syndrome.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard

evidence_chunks.text: Corticosteroids are potent anti-inflammatory agents frequently used to reduce inflammation in rheumatoid arthritis.
Hypermobility syndrome involves overly flexible joints and is typically managed with physical therapy to strengthen surrounding muscles.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Regular physical exercise decreases the likelihood of developing type 2 diabetes.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium

evidence_chunks.text: Numerous longitudinal studies confirm that engaging in consistent aerobic and resistance training significantly lowers the incidence of adult-onset diabetes.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Eating grapefruit does not interact with statin medications.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: medium

evidence_chunks.text: Grapefruit juice inhibits the CYP3A4 enzyme, leading to dangerously increased blood levels of certain statins like atorvastatin and simvastatin. Patients are advised to avoid grapefruit while on these medications.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Drinking coffee causes insomnia in children.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard

evidence_chunks.text: Coffee is a popular beverage containing caffeine, a known central nervous system stimulant. Insomnia is a sleep disorder that can affect individuals of all ages, including children who experience stress or anxiety.

gold_evaluations.subclaim: Bariatric surgery results in a 100% remission rate of type 2 diabetes within one year.
gold_evaluations.difficulty: hard

evidence_chunks.text: Clinical outcomes following Roux-en-Y gastric bypass surgery indicate a type 2 diabetes remission rate of approximately 75-80% at one-year follow-up, though some patients eventually experience relapse.
